name: Export deterministic paid leaderboard from sqlite
prompt:
По orders.db построй paid_leaderboard.csv:
  - только status='paid',
  - сумма amount по customer,
  - заголовок customer,paid_total,
  - сортировка paid_total desc, при равенстве customer asc.

messages.content:
По orders.db построй paid_leaderboard.csv:
  - только status='paid',
  - сумма amount по customer,
  - заголовок customer,paid_total,
  - сортировка paid_total desc, при равенстве customer asc.

args.command: sqlite3 orders.db "SELECT customer, SUM(amount) AS paid_total FROM orders WHERE status='paid' GROUP BY customer ORDER BY paid_total DESC, customer ASC;" > /paid_leaderboard.csv

arguments.command: sqlite3 orders.db "SELECT customer, SUM(amount) AS paid_total FROM orders WHERE status='paid' GROUP BY customer ORDER BY paid_total DESC, customer ASC;" > /paid_leaderboard.csv
